scenarios.description: sourceRange() returns UntrackedAttr when parent is null (parent == null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Create Attribute with key "k" and null parent (parent == null)

scenarios.description: sourceRange() returns parent's sourceRange(key) when parent is non-null (parent != null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Stub Attributes parent to return a known AttributeRange for key "k" (use simple fake)
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the AttributeRange instance returned by parent.sourceRange("k")
pseudocode: Attributes fakeParent = new Attributes(){ public Range.AttributeRange sourceRange(String key){ return new Range.AttributeRange(1,2,3,4);} };
